title: Fusion 3D Items
description: Replaces many item textures with 3D models
body:
![Banner](https://imgur.com/ATQhVVg.png)
### Fusion 3D Items replaces many flat item textures with 3D models.


![Separator](https://imgur.com/iCRtq3H.png)
### Fusion 3D Items requires  Fusion to work correctly. You can find Fusion by either clicking here or on the image below.


![Separator](https://imgur.com/vw2pqQR.png)
For future content, upcoming mods, and discussion, feel free to join the SuperMartijn642 discord server!
[](https://discord.gg/QEbGyUYB2e)

![Separator](https://imgur.com/eGKP7EW.png)
